  "findings": [
    "Wrong overload class setting on the VFD/motor controller",
    "Risk of premature motor failure or nuisance tripping due to incorrect thermal overload curve selection"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Isolate and lock out/tag out (LOTO) the VFD power supply",
    "Verify motor nameplate data including service factor and full-load amperes (FLA)",
    "Reprogram the VFD parameter for the correct overload protection class (e.g., Class 10, 20, or 30) per motor specifications and NEC 430.32",
    "Perform functional testing under load to verify correct thermal tracking"
  ],
  "rationale": "The VFD is currently operating with an incorrect overload class setting, which violates NEC 430 requirements for motor thermal protection and risks damaging the motor winding. The configuration must be corrected and verified before the asset can be safely returned to service.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 430.32",
    "NEC 430.122",
    "Manufacturer Programming Manual"
  ]
}
